settings.question: Do you deliver outside Metro Manila?
settings.answer: Yes. Provincial shipping options can be arranged depending on item size, value, and courier availability.

settings.question: What payment options are available?
settings.answer: TechCore PH can support GCash, Maya, card payments, bank transfer, and COD in selected areas when enabled in checkout.

settings.question: Can you check compatibility before I order?
settings.answer: Yes. Send your current parts list or target build so the team can confirm socket, chipset, RAM, PSU, and case compatibility.

settings.default_box_contents: Product unit, official packaging, included accessories, and receipt.
